intro.title: Simple. Smart. Seamless.
intro.step1Desc: Upload photos of your current wardrobe or sync with your favorite shopping apps.
intro.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes color palettes, textures, and silhouettes to build your digital DNA.
intro.step3Desc: Receive personalized daily lookbooks and shopping suggestions that fit your style.

features.title: Fashion Intelligence
features.subtitle: Built for the next generation of style enthusiasts.
features.aiRecDesc: Proprietary algorithms that learn your aesthetic and suggest outfits that actually match your personality.
features.tryOnDesc: Precise body mapping technology ensures you never have to guess your size across different brands again.
features.recycleDesc: Stay ahead of the curve with real-time analysis of global runway trends filtered through your style lens.

sustainability.title: Sustainable Wardrobe
sustainability.desc: AELIA is committed to circular fashion. Our platform doesn't just help you style your clothes—it helps you manage their entire lifecycle. Join our movement to reduce textile waste through smart recycling, reselling, and donation programs.
sustainability.upcycleDesc: Mix and match your existing clothes
sustainability.virtualTryOnDesc: Virtual TryOn Recycled pieces to ensure that it is perfectly complement your current wardrobe.

questions.title: Styling Questions?
questions.q0: How does the virtual try-on actually work?
questions.a0: It's simple! Upload a full-body photo of yourself, then choose any garment from our collection or upload your own. Our AI maps the clothing onto your body with realistic draping, lighting, and fabric simulation — so you can see exactly how it fits before you buy or wear it.
questions.q1: Can I use Redolapy with my current clothes?
questions.a1: Absolutely! You can upload photos of your existing wardrobe and our AI will analyze each piece — from color palettes to fabric textures. It can suggest fresh outfit combinations, identify styling gaps, and even recommend upcycling ideas for items you no longer wear. Your current clothes are the perfect starting point.
questions.q2: What kind of outfit recommendations can I get?
questions.a2: Our AI generates personalized daily lookbooks based on your style profile, wardrobe inventory, and even upcoming weather or events. From casual streetwear to formal occasions, the recommendations evolve with your taste — the more you interact, the smarter they get.

contactUs.heading: Contact
contactUs.description:
Have a question, partnership idea, or just want to say hi?
Drop us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactUs.namePlaceholder: enter your full name e.g. (engy ahmed)
contactUs.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.

faq.q0: How does the AI know my size?
faq.a0: Our AI uses precise body mapping technology that analyzes your uploaded photos to calculate your unique body measurements. It then cross-references these with brand-specific size charts to recommend the perfect fit every time.
faq.q1: Can I use ReDolapy with my current clothes?
faq.a1: Absolutely! You can upload photos of your existing wardrobe and our AI will analyze each piece — from color palettes to fabric textures. It can suggest fresh outfit combinations and identify styling gaps.
faq.q2: What kind of outfit recommendations can I get?
faq.a2: Our AI generates personalized daily lookbooks based on your style profile, wardrobe inventory, and even upcoming weather or events. The recommendations evolve with your taste over time.
faq.a3: Yes, we take privacy very seriously. All your photos and personal data are encrypted and stored securely. We never share your information with third parties without your explicit consent.
faq.q4: How can I cancel my subscription?
faq.a4: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. There are no cancellation fees and you'll continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.

footer.tagline: Elevating digital ateliers through artificial intelligence and human creativity.

aboutRecycle.heroDesc: Our intelligent recycling ecosystem ensures no garment ever goes to waste. Use our Smart Bins to recycle, track your environmental impact in real-time, and give your style a second life.
aboutRecycle.smallChanges: Small changes today, big impact tomorrow.
aboutRecycle.saveMoneyDesc: Refresh your personal style and get more tangible value from the high-quality clothes you already own.
aboutRecycle.reduceWasteDesc: Keep clothing out of landfills and reduce the overall environmental footprint of the fashion industry.
aboutRecycle.saveWaterDesc: Upcycling uses significantly less water compared to producing entirely new textile garments.
aboutRecycle.oldToNew: From old to new — endless creative possibilities.
aboutRecycle.threeSimpleSteps: Three simple steps to transform your clothes and make an impact.
aboutRecycle.uploadClothingDesc: Take photos of items you no longer wear or use and add them to your digital atelier
aboutRecycle.aiSuggestsIdeasDesc: Our AI analyzes your items and generates creative upcycling ideas tailored to your style.
aboutRecycle.transformReuseDesc: Bring your new design to life or connect with creators in our curated marketplace.

aboutTryon.heroDesc: See how any outfit looks on you before you buy. Our AI-powered virtual try-on brings the fitting room to your screen — no dressing rooms, no hassle.
aboutTryon.whyMattersSub: See it before you buy it — no fitting room required.
aboutTryon.fitAnalysisDesc: Preview outfits on your own body instantly. No more guessing if something will look good — see it in real-time.
aboutTryon.perfectFitDesc: Reimagine your existing wardrobe. Our AI suggests fresh combinations from clothes you already own.
aboutTryon.stylingTipDesc: Discover new styles and combinations you never considered. Experiment fearlessly with your wardrobe.
aboutTryon.howItWorksSub: Three simple steps to see yourself in any outfit.
aboutTryon.step1Desc: Take a full-body photo or use your camera to create your digital fitting room avatar.
aboutTryon.step2Desc: Browse our collection or upload any garment you like. Our AI maps it onto your body.
aboutTryon.step3Desc: Get a realistic preview in seconds. See exactly how the outfit looks on you with lifelike detail.

aboutPage.heroDesc: We are building the future of personal styling — where AI meets sustainability, and every wardrobe is smarter, greener, and more expressive. Our platform empowers you to discover your style, reduce waste, and make fashion personal again.
aboutPage.missionSub: Empowering sustainable style through artificial intelligence.
aboutPage.missionDesc: At Redolapy, we believe fashion should be personal, sustainable, and accessible to everyone. Our mission is to transform how people interact with their wardrobes by combining cutting-edge AI with circular fashion principles. We help you make smarter choices — reducing textile waste while maximizing your style potential.
aboutPage.valuesSub: Three pillars that drive everything we do.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Our advanced algorithms learn your unique style preferences, body measurements, and wardrobe inventory to deliver hyper-personalized recommendations that actually work for you.
aboutPage.value2Desc: We are committed to reducing fashion waste by promoting upcycling, smart recycling, and extending the lifecycle of every garment through intelligent recommendations.
aboutPage.value3Desc: Fashion is for everyone. Our platform is designed to be accessible, inclusive, and adaptable to all body types, style preferences, and budgets.
